title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
